mission.title: cloudevents: docs: add possibility of additional message modes.
mission.description:
Mentions the possibility of protocols adding different message modes (such as `batched`).
Fixes #645.

resolution.summary:
Another attempt to fix https://github.com/cloudevents/spec/issues/645

See also https://github.com/cloudevents/spec/pull/660

Signed-off-by: Christoph Neijenhuis <christoph.neijenhuis@commercetools.de>
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
